prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke McLaren Applied M840T 4.0L V8 twin-turbo engine with a custom billet aluminum crankshaft from **Manor Motorsport**, reinforced with **Pankl Racing Systems** titanium connecting rods (900g lighter than OEM) and **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio for high-boost applications).

Install a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing core) with **Tial MV-R 60mm** external wastegates, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M** standalone ECU running **McLaren F1-derived** torque vectoring algorithms and **Motec PDM30** power distribution for 1,200+ hp on **VP Racing Q16** 118-octane fuel.

Replace the OEM carbon-fiber driveshaft with a **GKN Lobro** CV-jointed titanium driveshaft (30% lighter, 20% stronger) and fit **AP Racing CP9460-4000** carbon-carbon clutch with a **Tilton** triple-plate setup, mated to a **Hewland** 6-speed sequential transaxle with **Xtrac** limited-slip differential (preload adjustable via **Motul Gear 300** 75W-140 fluid).
estetica: Fit a **Vorsteiner MP4-35** full-carbon aero package (front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps), including a **Dymag** carbon-fiber wheel conversion (19x12 front, 20x13 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** 325/30R20 tires.

Install a **Novitec Torado** carbon-fiber monocoque wrap with **3M Scotchprint Wrap Film Series 1080** in **McLaren Papaya Spark** with **Avery Dennison** matte black accents, paired with **OMP** carbon-fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) and a **Sabelt** 6-point harness.

Replace the OEM LED lighting with **LuxVision** laser headlights (600m range) and **Hella** Rallye 3000 auxiliary lights, integrated into a **Seibon** carbon-fiber hood with **AeroCatch** quick-release latches and a **Forge Motorsport** carbon-fiber air intake system (visible through a **Lexan** polycarbonate rear window).
